message:
🐛 Preserve dashboard data when kc-agent goes offline (Fixes #10470) (#10472)

When the kc-agent health check transitions to Offline, dashboard cards
were going blank because Layout.tsx auto-enabled demo mode, which
cleared all caches and switched cards to demo data display.

Root cause: Layout.tsx treated initial-load-without-agent and
agent-went-offline identically — both triggered setDemoMode(true).
Additionally, CardDataContext forced shouldUseDemoData when the agent
was unavailable, regardless of whether cached data existed.

Fix:
- Track wasEverConnected in AgentManager singleton — once the agent
  connects, the flag stays true for the session lifetime.
- Layout.tsx: skip auto-enabling demo mode when agent was previously
  connected (cached data remains visible with stale indicators).
- CardDataContext: skip forcing demo data for agent-dependent cards
  when the agent was previously connected (cached data persists).

The SWR (stale-while-revalidate) pattern now works correctly: cached
data stays visible when the agent goes offline, and only new fetch
attempts are affected by the offline status.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
